    Customer.setParcels(List<Parcel> parcels)

  • Uses of Parcel in com.wip.repository

    Methods in com.wip.repository that return types with arguments of type Parcel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Parcel>
    ParcelRepository.findByCreatedBy_Username(String username)
    Retrieves all Parcel records created by the user with the specified username.
    List<Parcel>
    ParcelRepository.findByCustomer_CustomerId(Long customerId)
    Retrieves all Parcel records belonging to the customer with the given ID.
